meaning: adj.(根据)公式的,用俗套话堆砌成的,刻板的
examples: His paintings are contrived and formulaic.
In terms of both structure and theme, the Odyssey and Liked were also oddly formulaic, to the point of predictability.
Traditional stories make use of formulaic expressions like 'Once upon a time...'.
Song writers will, inevitably, feel the pressure to make their songs more catchy, more formulaic.
"I wanted to make a culturally indigenous film while avoiding the formulaic subcontinental style, " he says.
